_comment: Consumed by bin/jonny-bench.mjs. $RUN_HOME=temp home, $WORKDIR=temp project dir, $RUN_DIR=results dir, $MODEL_ARG from models.json, $EFFORT=reasoning effort from models.json or null, $CAP_MINUTES=bench.capMinutes minus a 2-minute buffer, formatted like "28m" (for CLIs with their own internal wait timeout shorter than our wall-clock cap), $PROMPT=bench body, $SESSION_ID=uuid, $USER=real user. If an argv element references $EFFORT or $CAP_MINUTES and that variable is null, that element and its preceding flag element are omitted. credsFiles are copied from the real ~ into $RUN_HOME (0600). authExec writes stdout to writeTo (0600). seedFiles copies selected JSON keys plus extras (0600). env REPLACES the environment (runner adds PATH/TERM/LANG/LC_ALL allowlist only).

claude-code.usage: cli-output.jsonl stdout result event: total_cost_usd + all tokens processed = input_tokens + cache_read_input_tokens + cache_creation_input_tokens + output_tokens

codex.usage: cli-output.jsonl wrappers: stdout text contains JSONL; last type=turn.completed usage.{input_tokens,output_tokens}, or rollout transcript token_count total_token_usage.total_tokens fallback; input_tokens already includes cached tokens. no USD field (ChatGPT plan, unmetered). reasoning effort is pinned with model_reasoning_effort=$EFFORT; reasoning summaries enabled via model_reasoning_summary=detailed.

grok.usage: After the child exits and before RUN_HOME cleanup, usage is read from $RUN_HOME/.grok/logs/unified.jsonl records where msg is shell.turn.inference_done and ctx contains prompt_tokens, cached_prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, and reasoning_tokens. prompt_tokens already includes cached_prompt_tokens, so totalTokens sums prompt_tokens + completion_tokens + reasoning_tokens across inference_done records; totalCostUsd stays null. reasoning effort is pinned with --reasoning-effort $EFFORT.

antigravity.usage: This is the Antigravity CLI (agy), not the plain `gemini` CLI: the classic Gemini CLI oauth-personal login is rejected with IneligibleTierError on this account (migrate-to-Antigravity), and agy is the working replacement for the same Gemini 3.1 Pro model. Effort tier has no separate flag -- it's baked into $MODEL_ARG itself (e.g. "Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)"). --new-project is required or agy silently writes output under $RUN_HOME/.gemini/antigravity-cli/scratch/ instead of $WORKDIR, and locateAppDir never finds it. --print-timeout must be passed explicitly: agy's own internal wait timeout defaults to 5m, well under our wall-clock cap, and would truncate a run before our own cap ever fires; $CAP_MINUTES is bench.capMinutes minus a 2-minute buffer. transcriptGlob captures agy's PII-clean rich brain transcript at $RUN_HOME/.gemini/antigravity-cli/brain/*/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl (USER_INPUT, PLANNER_RESPONSE with thinking/tool calls, CODE_ACTION, CHECKPOINT, EPHEMERAL_MESSAGE). Do not use agy's cli.log as transcript: it embeds the authenticated Google account email and trips the leak gate. Token counts come from optional HTTPS metering with mitmdump on streamGenerateContent responses: only numeric usageMetadata counters are kept, raw flows and Bearer tokens are never persisted, and totalCostUsd stays null while estimatedCostUsd is computed from prices.json. If mitmdump is unavailable or no usageMetadata is observed, totalTokens/usage/estimatedCostUsd stay null.
